description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On December 30, 2025 at 7:31 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Divisadero Street at Lombard Street. 
 
The Waymo AV was stopped facing north in the right lane on Divisadero Street for a red light at the intersection with Lombard Street. 
While the Waymo AV was stopped, a passenger car traveling northbound on Divisadero Street in the same lane as the Waymo AV 
approached the Waymo AV from behind, and the front of the passenger car made contact with the rear of the stationaryWaymo AV. At the 
time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
